infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Park Tracker uses your camera so you can add photos to the parks you visit.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Park Tracker accesses your photo library so you can attach photos to parks you visit.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Park Tracker uses your location to show you on the map near parks.

plugins.photosPermission: Park Tracker accesses your photos so you can attach them to parks you visit.
plugins.cameraPermission: Park Tracker uses your camera so you can take photos of the parks you visit.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Park Tracker uses your location to show you on the map near parks.
